# Say Performance Test
# Tests performance with aggressive timeouts

# Build the say server binary
go build -o mcp-say-server .

# Test with aggressive timeout (10 seconds - say commands can take time)
timeout 10s exec mcp-say-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{"roots":{"listChanged":true},"sampling":{}}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/list","params":{},"id":2}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"say","arguments":{"text":"Quick test"}},"id":3}
EOF

# Verify operations complete within timeout
stdout '"name":"say"'
stdout 'Successfully spoke'
stdout 'Quick test'

# Test rapid sequential calls (each say waits for completion)
timeout 15s exec mcp-say-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{"roots":{"listChanged":true},"sampling":{}}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"say","arguments":{"text":"One"}},"id":3}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"say","arguments":{"text":"Two"}},"id":4}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"say","arguments":{"text":"Three"}},"id":5}
EOF

# Verify sequential calls work
stdout 'One'
stdout 'Two'
stdout 'Three'
